criteria.name: source_mode_benchmark
criteria.basis: source benchmark rerun succeeded with reference kernel 18/18

criteria.name: editable_install_and_cli
criteria.basis: pip install -e ., CLI demo/get, and benchmark all passed

criteria.name: wheel_build_install_and_cli
criteria.basis: wheel build, wheel install, CLI demo/get, and benchmark all passed

not_claimed: offline no-build-isolation editable install without build backend
claim_boundary: This report covers local, single-user, deterministic operation and installability in source, editable, and wheel modes. It does not claim hosted production validation.
